title: Flow If/Else (Python)
description: Two-branch conditional router. The condition is a sandboxed Python
expression evaluated against the active lane payload and the current
entry. Truthy → THEN, falsy → ELSE. Streaming lanes (image / audio /
video) are buffered until END so the condition sees the complete payload.

flow_pyeval.condition.title: Condition
flow_pyeval.condition.description: Python expression. Available bindings: the active lane payload by name (text, table, image, audio, video, questions, answers, documents, classifications), and `obj` for the current entry metadata. Examples: `len(text) > 100`, `image[:4] == b'\x89PNG'`, `'foo' in text and obj.size >= 1024 * 1024`.

flow_pyeval.timeout_s.title: Timeout (seconds)
flow_pyeval.timeout_s.description: Maximum wall-clock time for a single condition evaluation. Timeout routes to ELSE.

flow_pyeval.branches.title: Branch targets
flow_pyeval.branches.description: Maps each branch name to the list of downstream node IDs on that branch. Populated automatically by the canvas when you wire edges from the THEN / ELSE output ports.
